description: decoded descriptor of a source:"screen" frame — travels as its own utf8/json CaptureChunk, not in the image chunk

displayId.description: which display/monitor the frame was captured from

width.description: frame pixel width — the coordinate frame OcrResult regions map into

scale.description: backing-scale factor (retina); logical px × scale = physical px

deltaScore.description: future Δ-gate: how much this frame changed vs the last kept one — unread until the gate exists
